title: scaffold project structure
description: Create index.html, main.css skeleton, and all src/ module stubs so imports resolve.
notes: Created full project scaffold: index.html, styles/main.css, src/main.js, src/core/{state,events,tick,actions}.js, src/systems/{resources,research}.js, src/ui/{hud,buildingPanel,messageLog,researchPanel,tabs}.js, src/data/{buildings,units,techs}.js, src/utils/{logger,fmt}.js. Also created CLAUDE.md, roadmap.md, tasks.json, execution.log.

title: implement state, events, and tick loop
description: state.js (initial state), events.js (pub/sub), tick.js (setInterval 250ms emitting tick).
notes: state.js: full initial state with resources/rates/caps/buildings/units/techs/queues/messages. events.js: tiny pub/sub (on/off/emit) with Events constants. tick.js: 250ms interval loop with registerSystem(), startLoop(), stopLoop(). All systems registered in main.js.

title: implement resource system with production/consumption rates
description: resources.js system: on each tick, apply rates to state.resources. Rates derived from buildings and techs.
notes: Implemented as part of T001/T002 bootstrap. resources.js: recalcRates() sums building production/consumption with tech multipliers and unit upkeep; resourceTick() applies per-tick delta capped at caps; advances training queue. Integrated into tick loop via registerSystem().

title: implement building system (build, upgrade, demolish)
description: buildings data file, actions for build/upgrade/demolish, cost deduction, rate recalculation.
notes: data/buildings.js: 12 buildings with icon/cost/production/consumption/capBonus/requires. actions.js: buildBuilding() with 15%-per-level cost scaling, demolishBuilding(), trainUnit(). All trigger recalcRates() and emit events.

title: render resource HUD and building panel UI
description: UI components: resource bar at top, building cards panel, message log at bottom.
notes: hud.js: 6-resource HUD bar with icon/value/cap/rate, updates throttled to 1s. buildingPanel.js: grid of building cards with locked state, cost display, build/demolish buttons, click delegation. messageLog.js: scrolling event log, 15 visible entries. tabs.js: tab switcher for Buildings/Research/Log panels. researchPanel.js: tech tree with progress bar, prerequisite gating.

title: add unit data and training queue
description: units.js data, training queue system, UI panel for military.
notes: units.js: 4 units (soldier, archer, knight, mage) with cost/trainTicks/attack/defense/upkeep/requires. Training queue processed in resourceTick()._advanceTrainingQueue(). trainUnit() action in actions.js. Military panel (T007 session): militaryPanel.js added with army summary, training queue progress bar, and unit cards with cost/stat display and Train buttons.

title: implement map grid (20x20 tiles, fog of war)
description: Canvas-based 20x20 tile map with fog of war reveal on territory capture.
notes: systems/map.js: initMap() generates 20x20 tile grid with 5 terrain types (grass/forest/hills/river/mountain), player 3x3 capital at (10,10), ~20 enemy settlements. revealAround() expands fog on capture. territoryRateBonus() returns per-second rate bonuses for captured terrain (forest +wood, hills +stone, river +food, mountain +iron, grass +gold). ui/mapPanel.js: 480x480 canvas with terrain colours, player/enemy tints, fog-of-war, hover highlight for attackable tiles, click-to-attack. events.js: MAP_CHANGED, COMBAT added. state.js: map field added. index.html: Map and Military tabs added. main.js: initMap() called on boot/new-game, map saved/loaded.

title: basic combat resolution engine
description: Attack action, power calculation, outcome resolution, resource loot.
notes: systems/combat.js: attackTile(x,y) validates adjacency/fog/owner, sums unit attack values (with tech multipliers for tactics/steel/engineering), resolves combat probabilistically (win chance = power/(power+defense)), victory captures tile + grants loot + reveals neighbors, defeat loses 1 random unit. Defense scales with distance from capital (15 + dist*6). Log messages use combat-win/combat-loss types with matching CSS border colours.

title: territory capture and expansion mechanics
description: Capture adjacent tiles, apply territory bonuses to resource rates.
notes: Implemented as part of T007/T008. territoryRateBonus() in map.js returns rate bonuses integrated into recalcRates() in resources.js. Capturing tiles via attackTile() immediately triggers recalcRates() so bonuses apply. Map stats bar shows live territory/enemy/explored tile counts.

title: tech tree data and research system
description: techs.js data with prerequisites, research action, tick-based progress.
notes: Implemented as part of bootstrap. data/techs.js: 6 techs with cost/researchTicks/effectDesc/requires. systems/research.js: startResearch() validates prereqs and deducts cost; researchTick() advances queue and applies tech. ui/researchPanel.js: full tech tree UI with progress bar and gating.

title: save/load via localStorage (auto-save every 60s)
description: Serialize state to localStorage on interval, load on page open, manual save/load buttons.
notes: Implemented in main.js: _save() serializes state to localStorage key 'empireos-save'; _loadSave()/_applySave() restore on boot. Auto-save every 60s via setInterval. Manual Save button in title bar. New Game button clears save and reinits state. Version bumped to 2 to include map state.

title: tech effects applied to rates and unlock gates
description: Apply tech research bonuses to building multipliers, unit attack, and unlock requirements.
notes: Added 3 combat techs (tactics +25% attack, steel +50% attack, engineering +10% attack + unlocks Watchtower) to techs.js. Added tech requirements: knight requires metalworking, mage requires arcane, watchtower requires engineering. Wired warcraft -25% training speed in trainUnit() with totalTicks stored in queue entry for correct progress bar. buildingPanel now re-renders on TECH_CHANGED. militaryPanel reqStr shows tech icons/names via TECHS lookup. Army display shows tech-boosted combat power.

title: prestige / age advancement mechanic
description: Age system (Stone/Bronze/Iron/Medieval), unlock new buildings/units per age, prestige button.
notes: Created data/ages.js with 4 ages (Stone/Bronze/Iron/Medieval) each with productionMult (1.0/1.25/1.5/2.0), resource cost, and requirements (totalBuildings, totalUnits, territory, tech). Added state.age=0 to state.js. Added AGE_CHANGED event. Added advanceAge() to actions.js with full requirement checking + cost deduction. Applied age productionMult to building production in resources.js recalcRates(). Added age requirements to archeryRange (Bronze) and knight unit (Bronze). Building and military panels handle type:'age' in unlock logic and re-render on AGE_CHANGED. Research panel shows age section at top with current age, next age requirements checklist, cost, and Advance button. Age badge in title bar. Save/load includes age field (version 3).

title: random event system (raids, windfalls, disasters)
description: Time-triggered random events that affect resources, units, or territory.
notes: Created src/systems/randomEvents.js with 10 events (3 raids: bandit_raid/goblin_attack/pirates; 4 windfalls: merchant_caravan/bountiful_harvest/ore_vein/mana_surge; 3 disasters: drought/mine_collapse/plague). Disasters push temporary rate modifiers into state.randomEvents.activeModifiers, consumed by recalcRates() in resources.js. Events fire on a weighted-random 120ŌĆō240s interval. initRandomEvents() wired in main.js boot; randomEventTick() registered as a tick system. state.randomEvents saved/loaded (save version 4). Log colours: raid=red, windfall=green, disaster=orange.

title: quest/objective system with rewards

Each quest has a check() predicate, icon, and resource reward. initQuests() subscribes to BUILDING_CHANGED/UNIT_CHANGED/TECH_CHANGED/AGE_CHANGED/MAP_CHANGED. Created src/ui/questPanel.js rendering a card grid with completion progress bar; added ­¤Åå Quests tab in index.html. Added QUEST_COMPLETED event constant. state.quests saved/loaded. CSS: quest-card, quest-header, progress bar gold fill, log-entry--quest.

notes: Added @media (max-width: 480px) block to main.css: title bar condensed (font-size, padding); HUD resources shrink to flex: 1 1 30% with 10px font; tab bar uses overflow-x:auto + scrollbar-width:none (hidden scrollbar on all platforms); all card grids (buildings, units, techs, quests) collapse to single column; map canvas uses width:100%/height:auto with touch-action:none; story timeline icon offset reduced; research-active stacks vertically; age-panel tighter padding. title: diplomacy system (alliances, trade routes)

Created systems/diplomacy.js: initDiplomacy(), diplomacyTick() with AI stance changes (neutralŌåöalliedŌåöwar) and war raids; player actions proposeAlliance/openTradeRoute/closeTradeRoute/declareWar/proposePeace with gold costs (200/100/ŌĆö/ŌĆö/300). title: seasons cycle affecting resource rates

notes: Created data/seasons.js with 4 seasons (Spring/Summer/Autumn/Winter, 90s each). Spring: food +25%, wood +10%. Summer: wood +20%, food +10%, gold +10%. Autumn: food +15%, stone +20%, gold +20%. Winter: food -30%, wood -20%. Created systems/seasons.js: initSeasons(), seasonTick() advances season and emits SEASON_CHANGED; currentSeason()/seasonTicksRemaining() helpers. Season multipliers applied in resources.js recalcRates() to positive rates only (unit upkeep unaffected). Added season badge in title bar with live countdown tooltip. Added SEASON_CHANGED event. Save version 7.

Hero upkeep in recalcRates(); Inspire doubles training speed in _advanceTrainingQueue(). Combat: hero adds flat +60 power; Battle Cry ├Ś2 attack on next strike (consumed); Siege Master guarantees win (winChance=1.0, consumed). militaryPanel.js: hero section shows recruit card (age-gated, cost-gated) or active hero with ability buttons + cooldown countdowns (16-tick refresh). army section shows hero badge. HERO_CHANGED event. state.hero saved/loaded (version 8). CSS: .lb-table, .lb-header, .lb-row (--gold for #1), .lb-rank/name/territory/gold/age/date.

Added GAME_OVER event to events.js. Added state.gameOver field to state.js initState(). main.js: extracted _newGame() function (startLoop() + initVictory() + all system resets); old New Game button handler calls _newGame(); initGameOverPanel(_newGame) wired after UI init; victoryTick registered as 6th tick system; initVictory() called on boot. CSS: ach-grid (auto-fill 220px), ach-card (unlocked=gold border+tint, locked=55% opacity), ach-icon/body/title/desc/date/locked-label; log-entry--achievement (gold border + faint gold bg).

Wired in main.js boot sequence.

title: resource sparklines in HUD (60-second rolling SVG trends)

notes: hud.js: added HISTORY_LEN=60, SPARK_W=60, SPARK_H=18 constants; _history object (one array per resource); _sampleHistory() pushes current value and shifts when >60 entries; _sparkSVG(values, positiveRate) generates inline SVG polyline with min/max normalisation (1px padding on all edges), flat line for zero-range data, green stroke for positive-rate resources, red for negative; initHUD() adds <span class=hud__spark-wrap id=hud-spark-{id}> to each resource div; renderHUD() updates sparkEl innerHTML; _throttledRender() now calls _sampleHistory() before renderHUD() so history is always fresh at the render boundary. title: enemy AI territory expansion and counterattacks
description: Enemies periodically expand into neutral tiles (every 30ŌĆō60s) and occasionally counterattack player border tiles (every 90ŌĆō150s). Enemy power scales with game tick. Creates defensive pressure on the player.
notes: Created src/systems/enemyAI.js with two behaviours: _expandEnemies() picks a random enemy tile, finds an adjacent neutral tile, and captures it (interval 30ŌĆō60s / 120ŌĆō240 ticks); _counterattack() finds player border tiles adjacent to enemy tiles and probabilistically captures one (win chance = min(0.5, enemyPower/(enemyPower+playerDefense)); interval 90ŌĆō150s / 360ŌĆō600 ticks). Enemy power = 30 + tick/100 so pressure scales with game age. Capital tile is immune to counterattack. On enemy capture: one player unit is lost, recalcRates() called, MAP_CHANGED + UNIT_CHANGED emitted, 'raid' log message shown. initEnemyAI() and enemyAITick() wired into main.js (registered as 8th tick system, called in boot and _newGame). state.enemyAI = {nextExpansionTick, nextAttackTick} added to state.js and initState(); saved/loaded in main.js (save version 10).

title: difficulty presets (Easy / Normal / Hard)
description: Three difficulty modes selectable in Settings. Easy: +50% starting resources, raids/disasters 40% weaker, enemy AI 50% slower. Normal: unchanged. Hard: -25% starting resources, raids/disasters 50% stronger, enemy AI 30% faster. Difficulty persists across new games. Starting-resource bonus/penalty applied only at New Game. All other effects apply immediately on change.

title: alternative victory conditions (Diplomatic & Economic)
description: Add two additional win paths alongside the existing Conquest Victory. Diplomatic Victory: all 3 AI empires allied simultaneously. Economic Victory: 50,000 lifetime gold earned + Economics tech researched. Each path shows distinct messaging in the game-over overlay. Victory conditions checklist in Empire Summary expanded to show all three paths with live progress.

title: hero skills system

notes: data/hero.js: Added HERO_SKILLS (10 skills: battle_hardened/war_drums/logistics/treasury_guard/quartermaster/arcane_attunement/swift_training/veteran_knowledge/iron_will/war_profiteer), HERO_SKILL_WIN_INTERVAL=5, HERO_MAX_SKILLS=3, heroSkillBonus() pure helper. core/events.js: HERO_LEVEL_UP added. core/actions.js: recruitHero() adds skills/combatWins/pendingSkillOffer to hero state; trainUnit() applies swift_training -20% mult; added chooseHeroSkill(id). systems/combat.js: getAttackPreview() + attackTile() apply attackBonus + combatMult from hero skills; _victory() applies lootMult to loot + moraleBonus bonus from iron_will; added _trackHeroCombatWin() ŌĆö increments combatWins, generates pendingSkillOffer every 5 wins up to max 3, emits HERO_LEVEL_UP. systems/resources.js: hero skill resourceRate bonuses + ratesMult applied after hero upkeep in recalcRates(). systems/research.js: veteran_knowledge researchMult applied to totalTicks. ui/militaryPanel.js: imports updated; HERO_LEVEL_UP subscribed; _heroSkillsSection() renders either skill-chooser (offer pending) or active-skills list + progress line; inject into _heroActiveSection(); _handleClick intercepts [data-choose-skill]. main.js: save version 22ŌåÆ23; hero migration guard adds skills/combatWins/pendingSkillOffer on old saves. styles/main.css: .hero-skills-section/--offer, .hero-skills-title, .hero-skills-chooser, .hero-skill-option/__icon/__body/__name/__desc, .btn--skill-choose, .hero-skill-active/__icon/__body/__name/__desc, .hero-skills-hint/.hero-skills-progress.

Each event shows title, description, and two choices with resource/morale tradeoffs. Player resolves via Quest panel. Auto-expires to choice B after 2 minutes. History log shows last 4 decisions. POLITICAL_EVENT event. state.politicalEvents saved/loaded. Save version 24.

title: hero injury and recovery system
description: When the player loses a battle and the hero is recruited, 20% chance the hero is injured. Injured heroes contribute no combat bonuses and cannot use abilities for a 5-minute (1200 ticks) recovery period. Military panel shows a progress bar during recovery. Auto-recovers when tick reaches recoveryUntil. No save version bump needed (hero.injured / hero.recoveryUntil are new optional hero fields).

TICK handler: added h.injured to hasHeroActivity check so panel refreshes every 16 ticks during recovery. styles/main.css: .hero-card--injured (red border+bg tint), .hero-card__badge--injured (red pill), .hero-injured-msg (red 12px), .hero-recovery-wrap/.hero-recovery-bar-outer/.hero-recovery-bar-fill (redŌåÆgreen gradient), .hero-recovery-time (dim right-aligned).

Player accepts a contract (resources deducted immediately), waits 60s processing time, then collects the gold reward. One active contract at a time. Shows offer cards with resource requirements and reward, active contract progress bar, and countdown to next refresh. 8 contract templates across all resource types. Completing contracts earns prestige (+20) and increments totalTrades. CONTRACTS_CHANGED event. state.contracts saved/loaded.

Updated src/ui/marketPanel.js: added CONTRACTS_CHANGED subscription; TICK handler refreshes when active; _contractsSection() renders offer cards (with affordability check, red deliver/green reward), active progress bar with countdown, and "waiting" state with refresh timer; _handleClick handles accept-contract and cancel-contract data-actions. title: hero training expedition
description: When the Champion hero is recruited, healthy (not injured), and not on cooldown, the player can send them on a 2-3 minute training expedition. During the expedition the hero is unavailable for combat (no attack bonus, no abilities). On return: hero gains 2 combatWins (triggering skill level-up if threshold reached) and has a 25% chance of 100-200 gold bonus loot. Military panel shows expedition progress bar and Recall button. heroSystem.js handles expedition tick logic. title: faction alliance bonuses ŌĆö passive empire-specific perks when allied

title: seasonal special events ŌĆö one unique mid-season event per season cycle

title: resource overflow bank ŌĆö convert capped surplus to gold at 25% efficiency
description: When any non-gold resource is at 99%+ of its cap with a positive production rate, the surplus that would be wasted each tick is instead converted to gold at 25% efficiency. Tracked module-level in resources.js (no state persistence needed). HUD cells show a gold-border 'full' glow when at cap. HUD tooltip shows overflowŌåÆgold conversion rate for full resources, and shows overflow income sources in the gold tooltip. No new state fields or save version bump.
notes: systems/resources.js: Added module-level _overflowActive={food,wood,stone,iron,mana} tracking object. resourceTick(): inside the RESOURCE_KEYS loop, for non-gold resources with positive delta, computes overflow=max(0, (current+delta)-cap); if >0 accumulates overflowGold+=overflow*0.25 and sets _overflowActive[res]=true; after the loop, applies overflowGold to state.resources.gold (capped at gold cap). getBreakdown(): for gold resId, appends overflow source lines ({label:'Food overflow', value:rate*0.25}) for each non-gold resource at 99%+ cap with positive rate; for non-gold resId, computes overflowGoldRate=rate*0.25 if at cap+positive rate, returns it as new field. ui/hud.js: _showTooltip() builds overflowRow from breakdown.overflowGoldRate (gold text, '­¤Æ░ Overflow ŌåÆ gold: +X.XX/s'); injected into tooltip HTML. renderHUD(): toggles .hud__resource--full class when r.id!=='gold' && val>=cap*0.99 && rate>0. styles/main.css: .hud-tt__modifier--overflow (gold #ffd700 text); .hud__resource--full (gold border-color+subtle box-shadow). No save version bump ŌĆö overflow is fully computed from existing state on every tick.

title: tile improvement level 2 upgrades
